[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11100010 4
1 11000111 5
2 00100101 3
3 11111010 6
4 10111111 7
5 01011111 6
6 11101111 7
7 00011000 2

01 10100000 2
12 00010000 1
23 11100111 6
34 00000000 a
45 00000000 a

67 00000101 2
70 01000000 1

02 00000000 a

71 00100000 1

61 00000001 1
72 00000000 a
